findings.description: Silvester Jay Taylor (born 29 May 1877 in Fairview, Franklin, Idaho; died 10 Mar 1944 in Garibaldi, Tillamook, Oregon) was Benny Raphael Taylor's biological father.
supporting_sources: United States Census, 1940 — Benny (transcribed 'Bennie Taylor') enumerated in the household of Jay Taylor (Silvester Jay Taylor), East Garibaldi Election Precinct, Tillamook, Oregon
United States Census, 1930 — Benny R Taylor in his parents' household, Garibaldi, Tillamook, Oregon
Social Security Numerical Identification Files (NUMIDENT), 1936-2007 — application listing Benny's father

findings.description: Autossie Ann Bair (born 21 May 1883 in Richmond, Cache, Utah; died 24 Nov 1962 in Winnemucca, Humboldt, Nevada) was Benny Raphael Taylor's biological mother.
supporting_sources: United States Census, 1930 — Benny R Taylor in the household of his parents, Garibaldi, Tillamook, Oregon
Social Security Numerical Identification Files (NUMIDENT), 1936-2007 — application listing Benny's mother
GenealogyBank Historical Newspaper Obituaries — obituary naming Benny's parents

findings.description: Benny's parents Silvester Jay Taylor and Autossie Ann Bair were married on 21 Oct 1901 in Logan, Cache, Utah.

target_person.name: Silvester Jay Taylor & Autossie Ann Bair

supporting_sources: Utah, County Marriages — marriage of Silvester Jay Taylor and Autossie Ann Bair, 21 Oct 1901, Logan, Cache, Utah
